query:
-- الحصول على ID وتفاصيل admin (TiDB compatible)
SELECT 
  id, 
  username, 
  email,
  role,
  accountStatus, 
  trialEndDate,
  subscriptionEndDate
FROM users 
WHERE email = 'admin@radius-pro.com' OR username = 'admin'
LIMIT 1;

-- فحص NAS الخاص بهذا المستخدم
SELECT id, ownerId, nasname, status, provisioningStatus 
FROM nas 
LIMIT 5;
